items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of having source-level selection rows that can be deactivated or replaced. However, the evidence provided does not demonstrate that this requirement is satisfied, as there is no concrete API read or persisted state check confirming the ability to deactivate or replace these rows. The linked use case mentions the need for this functionality but lacks specific evidence to support its implementation, leading to an inconclusive verdict.
